channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McLaren's Lando Norris wins wet and wild Australian Grand Prix. Hamilton finishes 10th
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — McLaren’s Lando Norris won a chaotic rain-affected Australian Grand Prix, his first victory at Albert Park, with the British driver just managing to stay ahead of Red Bull’s Max Verstappen following a third safety car late in Sunday's season-opening Formula 1 race.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Frustrating start for Lewis Hamilton and Ferrari at F1 Australian Grand Prix
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Lewis Hamilton’s relationship with his new Ferrari team was pressure tested in Australia, where he finished a disappointing 10th on debut, and was frustrated by a bad strategy Sunday that cost him a potential victory, and constant radio chatter throughout the difficult ra
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 887th goal to move within 8 of breaking Wayne Gretzky's record
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin shook off a rough start to this three-game California swing by scoring his 887th career goal Saturday against the San Jose Sharks to move within eight of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rose BC's Angel Reese named Unrivaled's 2025 Defensive Player of the Year
item.description: Unrivaled announced Saturday that Rose BC forward Angel Reese of the WNBA's Chicago Sky was named the 2025 Defensive Player of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Proctor, Knueppel carry No. 1 Duke past No. 13 Louisville 73-62 for 2nd ACC title in 3 years
item.description: Tyrese Proctor scored 19 points on six 3-pointers, Kon Knueppel added 18 points and No. 1 Duke defeated 13th-ranked Louisville 73-62 on Saturday night to clinch its second Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship in three seasons under Jon Scheyer.
item.dc:creator: Steve Reed, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: J.J. Spaun takes the lead at The Players Championship on windy day that wrecked rounds
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — J.J. Spaun only had to look at the video boards around the TPC Sawgrass to appreciate the chaos going around him Saturday in The Players Championship.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Seattle scores three unanswered goals to beat Utah
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club could have taken a big step towards a potential playoff spot with a victory at Seattle Friday night, but the lowly Kraken scored three unanswered goals to pull out a 4-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ejiofor powers No. 6 St. John's past No. 25 Marquette 79-63 into 1st Big East final since 2000
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Zuby Ejiofor scored a career-high 33 points, a St. John's record in the Big East Tournament, and the sixth-ranked Red Storm pulled away from No. 25 Marquette 79-63 on Friday night to reach the conference championship game for the first time in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU gets shut down by #2 Houston, 74-54
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the Big 12 Tournament quarterfinals, BYU scored 49 points in the first half against Iowa State. But in the semifinals against #2 Houston, BYU didn't eclipse the 49-point mark until there were three minutes left in the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: WNBA great Candace Parker highlights late Tennessee coach Pat Summitt's 'truly important' legacy
item.description: Former Tennessee star Candace Parker reflected on Pat Summitt's legacy and shared how she continues to apply the life lessons the legendary coach taught her.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Bears signing former Commanders wide receiver in free agency
item.description: The Chicago Bears are signing free agent wide receiver Olamide Zaccheaus, who recorded a career-high 45 receptions for 506 yards and three TD catches with the Washington Commanders in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Column: Halas Hall is energized once more, but it's different than this time last year
item.description: The Chicago Bears have made significant offseason changes, including trading for DJ Moore and signing Grady Jarrett, in an attempt to turn their losing ways around and compete in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah moves closer to playoff berth with 3-2 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After blowing leads in their two previous meetings with the Anaheim Ducks this season, the Utah Hockey Club wasn't about to let it happen a third time.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Scripps Ranch 3, Madison 0
item.description: A battle of the birds in boys volleyball as the Scripps Ranch Falcons take the trip to Madison to face the Warhawks.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood Academy girls basketball team brings IHSA Class 4A state title back to South Side for 1st time in program history
item.description: NOTE: The attached video is from a feature story by GN Sports' Josh Frydman on the Kenwood Academy boys and girls basketball programs prior to the IHSA State Girls Basketball Tournament over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Nearing the end of a short spring, Cubs and Dodgers have made final preparations for season openers in Japan
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Shohei Ohtani's bat is ready for the defending World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers, while Shota Imanaga has looked good on the mound for the Chicago Cubs with less than a week remaining before baseball's regular-season opener in Japan.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, WGN 9
